MELItem.Title: Forward EE Cooling Exhaust Overboard Vent Valve

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the forward equipment cooling exhaust overboard vent valve open (AMM DDG 21-27-04).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
Gain access to forward equipment cooling exhaust overboard vent valve.

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Corrected the name of the valve for consistency.
ListItem.Para: Turn the open/close knob until the forward equipment cooling overboard exhaust valve is fully open.

OperationNote.Para: Forward cargo ventilation will be degraded.
For 787-9 (VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A869, VN-A870, VN-A871): FCAC will operate normally.

For 787-10 (VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879): Forward cargo compartment heat may be degraded. Temperature sensitive cargo should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details
